texto: God wants to dance with us. The goal of dancing is NOT to learn the steps. The goal of dancing is to enjoy your partner. We learn the steps but only so we don't have to look down at our feet. We are free to look into the eyes of the one we love.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nicole Johnson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “God wants to dance with us. The goal of dancing is NOT to learn the steps. The goal of dancing is…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, faith, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
